solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def answerString(self, word: str, numFriends: int) -> str:
        return word[:-numFriends + 1]
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: <The solution leverages the fact that the lexicographically largest string from all splits is the first part of the string when split into numFriends parts. It directly returns the largest possible split without generating all splits.>
